content:
💡 drivebase | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a unified and intuitive interface for managing files across multiple cloud storage services, accessible from a single desktop-like application.
✨ Key Features: • Desktop shell interface in the browser • Unified file browser across providers • Support for Google Drive, AWS S3, local filesystem, Dropbox, OneDrive • Batch operations (copy, move, transfer, delete) across providers • Smart conflict resolution
📖 Summary: Drivebase is an open-source, self-hosted platform that unifies multiple cloud storage providers into a single desktop-like interface. It allows users to browse, manage, and transfer files across services like Google Drive, S3, and local storage seamlessly.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
